entities.name: vosoritide

attributes.description: modified recombinant human C-type natriuretic peptide analogue

entities.context: Vosoritide (VOXZOGO) is a modified recombinant human C-type natriuretic peptide (CNP) analogue

entities.name: achondroplasia
entities.context: being developed by BioMarin Pharmaceutical for the treatment of achondroplasia

entities.name: FGFR3
entities.context: gain-of-function mutation in the fibroblast growth factor receptor 3 gene (FGFR3)

entities.name: fibroblast growth factor receptor 3
entities.context: fibroblast growth factor receptor 3 gene (FGFR3), which is a negative regulator of bone growth

entities.name: FGFR3 gain-of-function mutation
entities.context: caused by a gain-of-function mutation in the fibroblast growth factor receptor 3 gene

entities.name: natriuretic peptide receptor B
entities.context: Vosoritide acts to restore chondrogenesis through its binding to natriuretic peptide receptor B (NPR-B)

entities.name: C-type natriuretic peptide
entities.context: modified recombinant human C-type natriuretic peptide (CNP) analogue

entities.name: BioMarin Pharmaceutical
entities.context: being developed by BioMarin Pharmaceutical for the treatment of achondroplasia

entities.name: chondrogenesis
entities.context: Vosoritide acts to restore chondrogenesis through its binding to natriuretic peptide receptor B

entities.name: FGFR3 signalling pathway
entities.context: resulting in the inhibition of downstream signalling pathways of the overactive FGFR3 gene

entities.name: EU approval of vosoritide
entities.context: Vosoritide was approved in August 2021 in the EU for the treatment of achondroplasia in patients aged >= 2 years whose epiphyses are not closed

entities.name: bone growth
entities.context: FGFR3, which is a negative regulator of bone growth
